title: Nephro Urology Hospital Bangalore | Urology Hospital Bangalore | Blue Bliss Hospital
heading: Best Hospital in Bangalore
description: Blue Bliss hospital is one of the best nephro urology hospital in Bangalore. We have a panel of Expert Urologists & Nephrologists. We treat conditions like UTI, enlarged prostate, manage renal transplantation, kidney stone removal & acute kidney failure.
text:
Nephro Urology Hospital Bangalore | Urology Hospital Bangalore | Blue Bliss Hospital Specialities Find a Doctor SEARCH → Blue Bliss Hospital Best Hospital in Bangalore Centre of Excellence
                                in Nephrology, Urology & Kidney Transplant Care Blue Bliss Hospital established in the year of 2005 with a sole aim to promote high end
                                Tertiary Care Nephrology , Urology and Kidney treatment. It has established hospital and clinics in and around
                                Bangalore city for Kidney care treatment. We are a multispecialty hospital in
                                Seshadripuram, Bangalore. Our hospital has been a continuous centre of trust to many
                                patients, with high-quality care in urology ,
                                nephrology, and 15+ other specialties. Our hospital’s leaders, Dr. L.N. Raju, the Chief
                                Urologist and Chairman, and Dr. V.R. Raju, our Chief Nephrologist and CEO, have decades
                                of expertise in shaping Blue Bliss Hospital specific to its visionary and the leadership
                                in which the hospital is known excellent and uniquely different compared to all others.
                                We are one of the best, nephrology hospital and kidney transplant hospital in Bangalore
                                which is been persistently offering quality treatment in the world of nephrology. We have previously served over 100,000 patients, and our dialysis
                                    treatments exceeded 800 monthly advocate leadership in kidney care. At Blue
                                Bliss, we aim to be unique, and we provide state-of-the-art facilities to our patients
                                at an affordable cost. Center of
                        Excellence - Nephro Urology Bangalore Urology Personal Care for Personal Medical Issues. The
                                            hospital is equipped with latest equipment and
                                            technology to offer Comprehensive Urological
                                            Healthcare for all your needs. → Nephrology Nephrology is a speciality of internal
                                            medicine
                                            that relates to the diagnosis and treatment of
                                            diseases related to the Kidney. → General & Laparoscopy Surgery Less cut and more accuracy when it comes to
                                            key
                                            surgical procedures makes United Hospital, a
                                            game changer, in offering Comprehensive
                                            Tertiary Care. → Facts You Should Know 5 L+ PATIENTS TREATED 1 0K+ SUCCESSFUL SURGERIES 50 + EXPERT DOCTORS Our Doctors Dr. L N Raju Chief Urologist & Chairman Dr. V R Raju Chief Nephrologist & CEO PREV ← PREV NEXT → Next Dr. L N Raju Chief Urologist & Chairman Dr. V R Raju Chief Nephrologist & CEO Affordable Multispecialty Care in Bangalore Blue Bliss Hospital is the top hospital in Bangalore
                    offering multispecialty care at an affordable price. We have the best affordability and quality
                    because we offer all services related to kidney, urology, cardiology, and treated other diseases
                    under one roof, and considering the high cost, we have the solutions concerning the pricing and
                    accept almost all Insurances. 💊 Urology kidneys stones, prostate, and others. 🔬 Nephrology Dialysis, kidney transplant, CKD, and more. ❤️ Cardiology expert heart care, preventive cardiology, and surgeries. 🦴 Orthopaedics Bone and joint care, fracture to joint replacements. 🍽️ Gastro & Liver diagnosis and treatment for digestion and liver issues. 💨 Pulmonology respiratory care, e.g., asthma, COPD. 🚨 Emergency &
                            Critical Care services available 24/7. 💧 Dialysis over 800 treatments monthly. 🧪 Lab & Diagnostics services on par with the latest technology. Experienced Doctors and Affordable Care Our hospital is spearheaded by experienced doctors, Dr. L.N. Raju and Dr. V.R. Dr. Raju, with
                        over two decades of experience in the practice of urology and nephrology. We at Blue Bliss
                        Hospital believe healthcare should be affordable, and that is why we have managed to provide
                        high-quality healthcare that is pocket-friendly. We accept various insurance providers and
                        provide our patients with flexible payment options, ensuring you get the care you need in the
                        most affordable way possible. We have a pool of over thirty specialists to provide personalized
                        care to our patients. We are dedicated to providing the best and affordable care for the entire
                        Bangalore community, whether you are checking up with us for a routine check-up or visiting us
                        for emergency services. Book an Appointment Now 24/7 Facilities at
                Blue Bliss Hospital We understand that medical emergencies do not follow the schedule; thus, we offer 24/7 emergency
                    services. Our ICU, operation theatres, and ambulance are all open day and night to get you the
                    critical care you need at affordable prices. We believe in making lifesaving care accessible, and we ensure that our emergency services are
                    cost-effective, leaving your health as our primary concern but not the cost. Emergency Services ICU Diagnostics Pharmacy Operation Theatre Blood
                                        Bank Emergency Services Blue Bliss Hospital specializes in offering world
                                        class 24/7 emergency services. The
                                        word ‘failure’ does not exist in our dictionary as our doctors have the
                                        requisite
                                        skills to deal with the unexpected. Only the best and most capable of nursing
                                        staff
                                        are deployed at our emergency departments. Working as a team is a key to our
                                        success. ICU The hospital is well equipped with a state-of-the-art ICU with all critical care
                                        equipment available round the clock. There is a zero compromise policy with
                                        respect
                                        to the safety of patients and maintaining hygiene within the ICU. Frequent
                                        audits
                                        conducted by hospital authorities ensure that there is complete transparency in
                                        the
                                        way we function. Diagnostics Blue Bliss Hospital has a well-designed in house 24/7 diagnostic centre with some
                                        of
                                        the most advanced technology driven equipment in place to deliver critical test
                                        reports in quick time. All the lab equipment is tested for fitness and
                                        performance
                                        by a qualified staff to ensure error free test results. Pharmacy Blue Bliss Hospital understands the need for prompt pharmaceutical care. The
                                        counters
                                        are open 24/7 and our pharmacy provides round-the-clock service. Our pharmacy
                                        manages the procurement, preservation, storage, sterilisation, preparation,
                                        dispensing, and distribution of medicines in the hospital. Operation Theater Blue Bliss Hospital is well-known for its state-of-the-art facilities which
                                        includes
                                        Operation Theatres with most modern and technology driven surgical equipment.
                                        Extreme care is taken to fumigate the OT after every surgery to keep it
                                        infection
                                        free at all times. Regular audits are conducted by surgeons to ensure that the
                                        OT
                                        staffs adheres strictly to all safety and process rules as laid down by the
                                        hospital
                                        management. Blood Bank Much of the credit to our high percentage of patient satisfaction goes to a
                                        clinically organised and well-managed blood bank. The bank makes it a point to
                                        ensure that sufficient amount of stocks of the frequently needed blood groups
                                        are
                                        available, 24/7. The hospital also organizes blood donation camps at regular
                                        intervals to meet any immediate need for blood. Testimonial Blue Bliss Hospital staff is really supportive.
                                        They manage things very well and they
                                        keep proper track of time and the appointment list.
                                        I have not seen this kind of wonderful
                                        management in any hospital. It is a smooth,
                                        comfortable experience. PADMAJA BHAT Excellent Dr. L N Raju, he understans patient very
                                        well. He
                                        is the best doctor who saved my Pappa. The ways he makes the patient to
                                        understand
                                        is very good. I strongly recommend this doctor to all. Best treatment & best
                                        doctor.
                                        Thank to Daytoday Health team too for excellent post operative care. Meena Velani A Health set up par excellence right in the heart of
                                        the city
                                        with both the Raju Brothers who have enough experience and expertise in their
                                        respective fields of Urology and Nephrology and host of other specialist Doctors
                                        from different disciplines giving their services here, they make sure that the
                                        patients holistic recovery is planned and facilitated by looking at every single
                                        detail however insignificant it may look to others. The medical staff including
                                        duty
                                        doctors, nurses and ward boys including cleaning staff are well trained to make
                                        the
                                        patient not only comfortable but cheerful too. The non medical staff is also
                                        very
                                        professional and helpful to everyone. They have a well equipped pharmacy too.
                                        The
                                        best part about this hospital is that everyone knows and practices "SERVE WITH A
                                        SMILE" Amit surana A special thanks to Dr L N Raju for being very
                                        professional
                                        at his work and the way he treats his patients is very nice. Soft spoken and
                                        approachable. If there are any issues patients are facing, he makes sure that he
                                        solves the issue at the earliest with his due diligence. A big Kudos to his
                                        Staff
